name: J2EE Misconfiguration: Entity Bean Declared Remote
description: An entity bean in a J2EE application is declared with a remote interface, exposing its getter and setter methods to remote callers and creating an expanded attack surface for reading confidential data or modifying application state.
detection_pattern: META[ejb_jar_config] node declares an entity bean with a remote interface tag, exposing STORAGE[entity_bean] getter/setter methods via EGRESS[remote_interface] without a CONTROL[access_restriction] limiting the bean to local-only access
